title: ophiopogon koreanus
intro: Ophiopogon koreanus, also known as Korean lilyturf or Mondo grass, is a type of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, ophiopogon koreanus is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture to promote overall well-being and longevity.
